quizQuestions.explanation_en: Meeting the new compliance deadline proved onerous for smaller banks.

quizQuestions.explanation_en: The analyst presented a cogent argument for cutting interest rates.

quizQuestions.explanation_en: Customers are growing wary of unsolicited loan approval calls.

quizQuestions.question: Join using although: He was ill. He attended the exam.
options: Because he was ill, he attended the exam.
Although he was ill, he attended the exam.
Although he was ill, but he attended the exam.
If he was ill, he attended the exam.
quizQuestions.answer: Although he was ill, he attended the exam.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Although shows contrast. Illness and attending the exam are opposite/unexpected ideas.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Although contrast दिखाता है। Ill होना और exam attend करना opposite/unexpected situation है.
quizQuestions.rule: pattern: Although + Subject + Verb

quizQuestions.question: Choose the correct sentence.
options: Although he was poor, he was honest.
Because he was poor, he was honest.
Although he was poor, but he was honest.
If he was poor, he was honest.
quizQuestions.answer: Although he was poor, he was honest.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Although and but should not usually be used together in the same sentence.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Although + but साथ में generally गलत होता है।
quizQuestions.rule: Avoid although + but

quizQuestions.question: Join using though: The question was difficult. He solved it.
options: Though the question was difficult, but he solved it.
Because the question was difficult, he solved it.
Though the question was difficult, he solved it.
If the question was difficult, he solved it.
quizQuestions.answer: Though the question was difficult, he solved it.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Though shows contrast between difficulty and successful solving.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Question difficult था, फिर भी उसने solve किया। यह contrast है.
quizQuestions.rule: pattern: Though + Subject + Verb

quizQuestions.question: Fill in the blank: He is young, ___ he is very mature.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Though shows contrast between being young and being mature.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Young होना और mature होना contrast create कर रहा है.
quizQuestions.rule: though + clause

quizQuestions.question: Join using even though: She had no experience. She got selected.
options: If she had no experience, she got selected.
Even though she had no experience, she got selected.
Because she had no experience, she got selected.
Even though she had no experience, but she got selected.
quizQuestions.answer: Even though she had no experience, she got selected.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Even though shows strong contrast.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Even though strong contrast दिखाता है। भले ही उसके पास experience नहीं था, फिर भी वह select हो गई.
quizQuestions.rule: pattern: Even though + Subject + Verb

quizQuestions.question: Choose the correct connector: ___ it was raining heavily, the match continued.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Rain and the match continuing are opposite ideas, so a contrast connector is required.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Rain और match continue होना opposite direction में हैं, इसलिए contrast connector चाहिए.
quizQuestions.rule: contrast connector

quizQuestions.question: Join using despite: He was tired. He continued working.
options: Despite being tired, he continued working.
Because he was tired, he continued working.
Although being tired, he continued working.
Despite he was tired, he continued working.
quizQuestions.answer: Despite being tired, he continued working.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Despite takes a noun phrase or V-ing, not a full Subject + Verb clause.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Despite के बाद Subject + Verb नहीं आता; noun/V-ing आता है.
quizQuestions.rule: Despite + noun/V-ing

quizQuestions.question: Choose the correct sentence.
options: Although being ill, he came to class.
Despite he was ill, he came to class.
Despite being ill, he came to class.
Because he was ill, he came to class.
quizQuestions.answer: Despite being ill, he came to class.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Despite should be followed by noun/V-ing, so 'being ill' is correct.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Despite + being ill correct है. 'Despite he was ill' wrong है.
quizQuestions.rule: Despite + V-ing

quizQuestions.question: Join using in spite of: He had little money. He helped the poor.
options: Because he had little money, he helped the poor.
In spite of he had little money, he helped the poor.
Although having little money, he helped the poor.
In spite of having little money, he helped the poor.
quizQuestions.answer: In spite of having little money, he helped the poor.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: In spite of is used like despite and is followed by noun/V-ing.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: In spite of भी despite जैसा है. इसके बाद noun या V-ing आता है.
quizQuestions.rule: In spite of + noun/V-ing

quizQuestions.question: Transform: Although she was nervous, she performed well.
options: Although he was ill, he attended the exam.
In spite of being nervous, she performed well.
In spite of having little money, he helped the poor.
The plan was expensive. However, it was effective.
quizQuestions.answer: In spite of being nervous, she performed well.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Although + clause can be transformed into in spite of + V-ing/noun phrase.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Although + S + V को In spite of + V-ing में बदला गया.
quizQuestions.rule: Although clause -> In spite of + V-ing

quizQuestions.question: Join using however: The plan was expensive. It was effective.
options: The plan was expensive. Therefore, it was effective.
The plan was expensive. Moreover, it was effective.
The plan was expensive. However, it was effective.
In spite of being nervous, she performed well.
quizQuestions.answer: The plan was expensive. However, it was effective.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: However is a formal contrast connector used between two sentences or clauses.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: However formal contrast connector है. Plan महँगा था, हालाँकि effective था.
quizQuestions.rule: Sentence. However, sentence.

quizQuestions.question: Fill in the blank: He worked hard. ___, he could not pass.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Working hard and not passing create contrast.
quizQuestions.rule: However = but/formal contrast

quizQuestions.question: Join using whereas: Ravi likes tea. Mohan likes coffee.
options: Ravi likes tea, whereas Mohan likes coffee.
Although ravi likes tea, mohan likes coffee.
Ravi likes tea. Therefore, Mohan likes coffee.
Ravi likes tea because mohan likes coffee.
quizQuestions.answer: Ravi likes tea, whereas Mohan likes coffee.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Whereas shows comparison contrast between two people or facts.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Whereas comparison contrast दिखाता है: Ravi tea पसंद करता है, जबकि Mohan coffee.
quizQuestions.rule: Clause, whereas clause

quizQuestions.question: Choose the correct connector: The first method is fast, ___ the second method is more accurate.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: The sentence compares two methods and shows contrast between speed and accuracy.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Fast vs accurate — comparison contrast है.
quizQuestions.rule: whereas for comparison contrast

quizQuestions.question: Join using while as contrast: Some students prefer online classes. Others prefer offline classes.
options: Although some students prefer online classes, others prefer offline classes.
Some students prefer online classes, while others prefer offline classes.
Some students prefer online classes because others prefer offline classes.
Some students prefer online classes. Therefore, others prefer offline classes.
quizQuestions.answer: Some students prefer online classes, while others prefer offline classes.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Here while means whereas and shows contrast.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: यहाँ while का meaning 'whereas / जबकि' है.
quizQuestions.rule: while = whereas

quizQuestions.question: Join using while as time: I was studying. My brother was watching TV.
options: You may enter the hall provided that you carry your admit card.
While I was studying, my brother was watching TV.
The company reduced production. Consequently, many workers lost their jobs.
Some students prefer online classes, while others prefer offline classes.
quizQuestions.answer: While I was studying, my brother was watching TV.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Here while shows that both actions happened at the same time.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: यहाँ while time connector है: जब मैं पढ़ रहा था.
quizQuestions.rule: while = when/during the time

quizQuestions.question: Join using because: He failed. He did not study.
options: He failed; moreover, he did not study.
He failed because he did not study.
He failed. Therefore, he did not study.
He failed although he did not study.
quizQuestions.answer: He failed because he did not study.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Because gives the reason and takes Subject + Verb after it.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Because reason बताता है और इसके बाद Subject + Verb आता है.
quizQuestions.rule: Because + Subject + Verb

quizQuestions.question: Choose the correct sentence.
options: He was late; moreover, he got stuck in traffic.
He was late because he got stuck in traffic.
He was late although he got stuck in traffic.
He was late. Therefore, he got stuck in traffic.
quizQuestions.answer: He was late because he got stuck in traffic.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Because should be followed by a full clause, not just a noun.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Because के बाद full clause चाहिए: he got stuck.
quizQuestions.rule: Because + clause

quizQuestions.question: Join using because of: The match was cancelled. It rained heavily.
options: The match was cancelled. Therefore, of heavy rain.
The match was cancelled. Therefore, heavy rain.
The match was cancelled; moreover, of heavy rain.
The match was cancelled because of heavy rain.
quizQuestions.answer: The match was cancelled because of heavy rain.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Because of is followed by a noun phrase; 'heavy rain' is a noun phrase.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Because of के बाद noun आता है: heavy rain.
quizQuestions.rule: Because of + noun/V-ing

quizQuestions.question: Choose the correct sentence.
options: He failed because he did not study.
Because of his carelessness, he failed.
He was late because he got stuck in traffic.
The flight was delayed due to bad weather.
quizQuestions.answer: Because of his carelessness, he failed.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Because of should be followed by noun phrase; 'his carelessness' is a noun phrase.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Because of + noun. 'His carelessness' noun phrase है.
quizQuestions.rule: Because of + noun phrase

quizQuestions.question: Join using due to: The flight was delayed. There was bad weather.
options: The flight was delayed despite bad weather.
The flight was delayed due to bad weather.
The flight was delayed because bad weather.
The flight was delayed. Therefore, bad weather.
quizQuestions.answer: The flight was delayed due to bad weather.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Due to gives the reason and is followed by noun phrase.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Due to reason बताता है, और इसके बाद noun phrase आता है.
quizQuestions.rule: Due to + noun phrase

quizQuestions.question: Fill in the blank: The school was closed ___ heavy rain.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Heavy rain is a noun phrase, so due to is correct.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Heavy rain noun phrase है, इसलिए due to correct है.
quizQuestions.rule: due to + noun

quizQuestions.question: Use since as reason: He was unwell. He stayed at home.
options: If he was unwell, he stayed at home.
Since he was unwell, he stayed at home.
Therefore he was unwell, he stayed at home.
Although he was unwell, he stayed at home.
quizQuestions.answer: Since he was unwell, he stayed at home.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Here since means because and gives a reason.
quizQuestions.rule: Since = because

quizQuestions.question: Use since as time: He has lived in Delhi. He came here in 2020.
options: He has lived in Delhi until 2020.
He has lived in Delhi since 2020.
He has lived in Delhi because 2020.
He has lived in Delhi therefore 2020.
quizQuestions.answer: He has lived in Delhi since 2020.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Here since means from a point of time.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: यहाँ since = तब से. Time point के लिए since use होता है.
quizQuestions.rule: Since + time point

quizQuestions.question: Join using therefore: He missed the bus. He reached late.
options: He missed the bus because he reached late.
He missed the bus. Moreover, he reached late.
He missed the bus. However, he reached late.
He missed the bus. Therefore, he reached late.
quizQuestions.answer: He missed the bus. Therefore, he reached late.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Therefore shows result. Missing the bus caused him to reach late.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Therefore result दिखाता है. Bus miss करना reason है, late reach करना result.
quizQuestions.rule: Sentence. Therefore, sentence.

quizQuestions.question: Fill in the blank: The demand increased. ___, the prices rose.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Price rise is the result of increased demand.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Demand increase होने का result price rise है.
quizQuestions.rule: therefore = result

quizQuestions.question: Join using thus: He practised daily. He improved his speed.
options: He practised daily. Thus, he improved his speed.
He practised daily because he improved his speed.
He practised daily. Moreover, he improved his speed.
He practised daily. However, he improved his speed.
quizQuestions.answer: He practised daily. Thus, he improved his speed.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Thus is a formal result connector.
quizQuestions.rule: Sentence. Thus, sentence.

quizQuestions.question: Choose the correct connector: The evidence was weak. ___, the case was dismissed.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: The case being dismissed is the result of weak evidence.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Weak evidence के कारण case dismiss हुआ. यह result है.
quizQuestions.rule: thus = result

quizQuestions.question: Join using hence: He was not eligible. His application was rejected.
options: He was not eligible. Moreover, his application was rejected.
He was not eligible. However, his application was rejected.
He was not eligible because his application was rejected.
He was not eligible. Hence, his application was rejected.
quizQuestions.answer: He was not eligible. Hence, his application was rejected.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Hence is a formal result connector.
quizQuestions.rule: Sentence. Hence, sentence.

quizQuestions.question: Fill in the blank: The data was incomplete. ___, the report could not be finalized.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: The report not being finalized is the result of incomplete data.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Incomplete data का result है report finalize न होना.
quizQuestions.rule: hence = therefore

quizQuestions.question: Join using consequently: The company reduced production. Many workers lost their jobs.
options: The company reduced production. Consequently, many workers lost their jobs.
The company reduced production. However, many workers lost their jobs.
The company reduced production because many workers lost their jobs.
The company reduced production. Moreover, many workers lost their jobs.
quizQuestions.answer: The company reduced production. Consequently, many workers lost their jobs.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Consequently means as a result.
quizQuestions.rule: Sentence. Consequently, sentence.

quizQuestions.question: Choose the correct connector: He ignored the warning. ___, he faced serious problems.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Facing problems is the result of ignoring the warning.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Warning ignore करने का result problems हैं.
quizQuestions.rule: consequently = result

quizQuestions.question: Join using if: You work hard. You will succeed.
options: If you work hard, you will succeed.
Because you work hard, you will succeed.
Although you work hard, you will succeed.
Therefore you work hard, you will succeed.
quizQuestions.answer: If you work hard, you will succeed.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: If introduces a condition.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: If condition बताता है: अगर मेहनत करोगे, तो सफल होगे.
quizQuestions.rule: If + condition clause

quizQuestions.question: Fill in the blank: ___ you revise daily, you will remember the concepts.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Daily revision is the condition for remembering concepts.
quizQuestions.rule: If + simple present, will + V1

quizQuestions.question: Join using unless: You do not study. You will fail.
options: Because you study, you will fail.
Although you study, you will fail.
Unless you study, you will fail.
If you study, you will fail.
quizQuestions.answer: Unless you study, you will fail.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Unless means if not.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Unless = if not. जब तक तुम पढ़ाई नहीं करोगे, तुम fail होगे.
quizQuestions.rule: Unless = if not

quizQuestions.question: Choose the correct sentence.
options: Because you work hard, you will fail.
Although you work hard, you will fail.
If you work hard, you will fail.
Unless you work hard, you will fail.
quizQuestions.answer: Unless you work hard, you will fail.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Unless already carries negative meaning, so do not add extra not.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Unless already negative meaning देता है. इसके साथ extra not नहीं लगाना.
quizQuestions.rule: Avoid unless + not

quizQuestions.question: Join using provided that: You may enter the hall. You must carry your admit card.
options: You may enter the hall although you carry your admit card.
You may enter the hall. Therefore, you carry your admit card.
You may enter the hall because you carry your admit card.
You may enter the hall provided that you carry your admit card.
quizQuestions.answer: You may enter the hall provided that you carry your admit card.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Provided that is a formal condition connector.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Provided that formal condition connector है.
quizQuestions.rule: provided that + condition

quizQuestions.question: Fill in the blank: You can apply for the post ___ you meet the eligibility criteria.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Meeting eligibility is the condition for applying.
quizQuestions.rule: provided that = if/but only if

quizQuestions.question: Join using so that: He saved money. He wanted to buy a laptop.
options: He saved money. Therefore, he could buy a laptop.
He saved money so that he could buy a laptop.
He saved money because he could buy a laptop.
He saved money although he could buy a laptop.
quizQuestions.answer: He saved money so that he could buy a laptop.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: So that shows purpose.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: So that purpose बताता है: उसने पैसे बचाए ताकि laptop खरीद सके.
quizQuestions.rule: so that + could/can/may

quizQuestions.question: Choose the correct connector: She spoke loudly ___ everyone could hear her.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: The purpose of speaking loudly was that everyone could hear her.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Speaking loudly का purpose है everyone could hear her.
quizQuestions.rule: so that = purpose

quizQuestions.question: Join using in order to: He joined coaching. He wanted to improve his preparation.
options: He joined coaching in order to improve his preparation.
He joined coaching although improve his preparation.
He joined coaching because to improve his preparation.
He joined coaching; otherwise, improve his preparation.
quizQuestions.answer: He joined coaching in order to improve his preparation.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: In order to shows purpose and is followed by V1.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: In order to purpose बताता है. Structure: in order to + V1.
quizQuestions.rule: in order to + V1

quizQuestions.question: Fill in the blank: She left early ___ catch the train.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Catching the train is the purpose of leaving early.
quizQuestions.rule: in order to + V1

quizQuestions.question: Join using moreover: The phone has a good camera. It also has a powerful battery.
options: The phone has a good camera. However, it has a powerful battery.
The phone has a good camera. Moreover, it has a powerful battery.
The phone has a good camera because it has a powerful battery.
The phone has a good camera. Therefore, it has a powerful battery.
quizQuestions.answer: The phone has a good camera. Moreover, it has a powerful battery.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Moreover adds an extra positive point.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Moreover extra positive point add करता है.
quizQuestions.rule: Sentence. Moreover, sentence.

quizQuestions.question: Fill in the blank: The course is affordable. ___, it provides quality content.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Both points move in the same direction, so an addition connector is needed.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: दोनों points same direction में हैं. Addition connector चाहिए.
quizQuestions.rule: moreover = in addition

quizQuestions.question: Join using furthermore: The plan is simple. It is also practical.
options: The plan is simple because it is practical.
The plan is simple. However, it is practical.
The plan is simple. Therefore, it is practical.
The plan is simple. Furthermore, it is practical.
quizQuestions.answer: The plan is simple. Furthermore, it is practical.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Furthermore is a formal addition connector.
quizQuestions.rule: Sentence. Furthermore, sentence.

quizQuestions.question: Choose the correct connector: The policy will help farmers. ___, it will increase rural employment.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: The second point adds another benefit to the first point.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Second point first point में extra benefit add कर रहा है.
quizQuestions.rule: furthermore = addition

quizQuestions.question: Fill in the blank: Many banking exams test reasoning skills; ___, IBPS SO and SBI SO include reasoning sections.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: IBPS SO and SBI SO are examples.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: IBPS SO और SBI SO examples हैं.
quizQuestions.rule: for example + example

quizQuestions.question: Use for example: Some topics are important in English. RC and Cloze Test are two of them.
options: Some topics are important in English; in other words, RC and Cloze Test are frequently asked.
Some topics are important in English; however, RC and Cloze Test are frequently asked.
Some topics are important in English; therefore, RC and Cloze Test are frequently asked.
Some topics are important in English; for example, RC and Cloze Test are frequently asked.
quizQuestions.answer: Some topics are important in English; for example, RC and Cloze Test are frequently asked.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: For example introduces examples to clarify a general idea.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: For example example introduce करता है.
quizQuestions.rule: general idea; for example, examples

quizQuestions.question: Join using in other words: The exam has sectional timing. Each section has a fixed time limit.
options: The exam has sectional timing; therefore, each section has a fixed time limit.
The exam has sectional timing; in other words, each section has a fixed time limit.
The exam has sectional timing; for example, each section has a fixed time limit.
The exam has sectional timing; however, each section has a fixed time limit.
quizQuestions.answer: The exam has sectional timing; in other words, each section has a fixed time limit.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: In other words gives clarification or restatement.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: In other words clarification देता है.
quizQuestions.rule: statement; in other words, explanation

quizQuestions.question: Fill in the blank: He is an introvert; ___, he prefers limited social interaction.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: The second part explains the first part.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Second sentence first sentence को explain कर रहा है.
quizQuestions.rule: in other words = दूसरे शब्दों में

quizQuestions.question: Join using otherwise: Work hard. You may fail.
options: Work hard; however, you may fail.
Work hard; otherwise, you may fail.
Work hard; moreover, you may fail.
Work hard; therefore, you may fail.
quizQuestions.answer: Work hard; otherwise, you may fail.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Otherwise shows a warning or negative result if the advice is not followed.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Otherwise warning/result दिखाता है: मेहनत करो, नहीं तो fail हो सकते हो.
quizQuestions.rule: advice; otherwise, negative result

quizQuestions.question: Fill in the blank: Submit the form today; ___, you may miss the deadline.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: If the form is not submitted, the negative result is missing the deadline.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Form submit न करने का negative result deadline miss होना है.
quizQuestions.rule: otherwise = नहीं तो

quizQuestions.question: Join using not only...but also: She is intelligent. She is hardworking.
options: She is not only intelligent but also hardworking.
She is not only intelligent but hardworking.
She is only not intelligent but also hardworking.
She is not only intelligent and also hardworking.
quizQuestions.answer: She is not only intelligent but also hardworking.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: This connector shows addition with emphasis.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: यह connector emphasis के साथ addition दिखाता है.
quizQuestions.rule: not only X but also Y

quizQuestions.question: Correct the sentence if needed: He not only sings but also dances.
options: He not only sings and also dances.
He not only sings but dances.
He only not sings but also dances.
He not only sings but also dances.
quizQuestions.answer: He not only sings but also dances.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: The sentence is already correct because the parallel structure is maintained: sings + dances.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: यह sentence already correct है क्योंकि parallel structure maintain है: sings + dances.
quizQuestions.rule: parallel structure

quizQuestions.question: Join using as soon as: He reached the station. The train left.
options: As soon as he reached the station, the train left.
Because he reached the station, the train left.
Until he reached the station, the train left.
Although he reached the station, the train left.
quizQuestions.answer: As soon as he reached the station, the train left.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: As soon as shows immediate time relation.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: As soon as immediate time relation दिखाता है: जैसे ही वह station पहुँचा, train चली गई.
quizQuestions.rule: As soon as + clause

quizQuestions.question: Fill in the blank: ___ the exam started, the server crashed.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: The server crashed immediately after the exam started.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Exam start होते ही server crash हुआ.
quizQuestions.rule: as soon as = immediately when

quizQuestions.question: Join using until: Wait here. I return.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: Until shows continuation up to a point of time.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Until continuation दिखाता है: जब तक मैं वापस न आऊँ, यहीं रुको.
quizQuestions.rule: until + present clause

quizQuestions.question: Choose the correct sentence.
options: I will wait because you come.
I will wait. Therefore, you come.
I will wait unless you come.
I will wait until you come.
quizQuestions.answer: I will wait until you come.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: After time connectors like until, when, and as soon as, simple present is used for future meaning in exam grammar.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Time connectors जैसे until, when, as soon as के बाद future meaning में भी simple present आता है.
quizQuestions.rule: until + simple present

quizQuestions.question: Join using so...that: He was very weak. He could not walk.
options: He was so weak than he could not walk.
He was very weak that he could not walk.
He was too weak that he could not walk.
He was so weak that he could not walk.
quizQuestions.answer: He was so weak that he could not walk.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: So...that shows degree and result.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: So...that degree + result दिखाता है: वह इतना कमजोर था कि चल नहीं सकता था.
quizQuestions.rule: so + adjective + that + result

quizQuestions.question: Fill in the blank: The question was ___ difficult ___ no one could solve it.
quizQuestions.explanation_en: The difficulty caused the result that no one solved it.
quizQuestions.explanation_hi: Difficulty का result है कि no one solved it.
quizQuestions.rule: so + adjective + that
